---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for claude-vc
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Description

A clear description of the feature you would like.

## Use Case

Describe the problem this feature would solve, or the workflow it would
improve. Why is this valuable for VC analysis?

## Proposed Solution

How you think this could work. Include example commands, output formats, or
workflow descriptions if applicable.

```text
/vc example-command <args>
```

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you have considered and why they are less ideal.

## Additional Context

Any other context, references, or examples that support this request.
